contentBlocks.original:
ॐ स्वस्ति प्रजाभ्यः परिपालयन्ताम्
न्यायेन मार्गेण महीं महीशाः ।
गोब्राह्मणेभ्यश्शुभमस्तु नित्यम्
लोकास्समस्तास्सुखिनो भवन्तु ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
oṃ svasti prajābhyaḥ paripālayantām
nyāyena mārgeṇa mahīṃ mahīśāḥ .
gobrāhmaṇebhyaśśubhamastu nityam
lokāssamastāssukhino bhavantu ..
contentBlocks.translation: May there be prosperity to the subjects, the rulers protecting the world in a lawful manner; may the cows and brahmanas have auspiciousness eternally, may all the people be prosperous, may the rains shower in the proper season, may the earth be prosperous with the abundant crops; may the country be free from distress, may the brahmanas be fearless.
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐ (oṃ) – sacred sound; स्वस्ति (svasti) – prosperity; प्रजाभ्यः (prajābhyaḥ) – to the subjects (prajā:subjects | bhyaḥ:to); परिपालयन्ताम् (paripālayantām) – may they protect; न्यायेन (nyāyena) – by law; मार्गेण (mārgeṇa) – by the path; महीं (mahīm) – the earth; महीशाः (mahīśāḥ) – rulers (mahī:earth | śāḥ:rulers); गौ (gau) – cows; ब्राह्मणेभ्यः (brāhmaṇebhyaḥ) – to the brahmanas (brāhmaṇa:brahmanas | bhyaḥ:to); शुभम् (śubham) – auspiciousness; अस्तु (astu) – may it be; नित्यम् (nityam) – eternally; लोकाः (lokāḥ) – worlds; समस्ताः (samastāḥ) – all; सुखिनः (sukhinaḥ) – happy; भवन्तु (bhavantu) – may they be;
